action_set_definitions.name: monitor_water_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time metrics for the Brackish System-B unit, including TAN, DO, pH, and biomass stress levels.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_aeration_intensity
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the mechanical aeration systems to increase or decrease dissolved oxygen levels.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_ph_stabilizer
action_set_definitions.description: Adds chemical agents to the water to shift the pH into the target range (6.5 - 7.4).

agent_type.description: Sodium bicarbonate increases pH; Citric acid solution decreases pH.

dosage_kg.description: The mass of the stabilizer to add.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_bio_remediation_culture
action_set_definitions.description: Introduces concentrated nitrifying bacteria (Nitrosomonas/Nitrobacter) to biologically consume Total Ammonia Nitrogen (TAN). This is the primary method for ammonia reduction when water exchange and zeolite are prohibited.

culture_volume_liters.description: Volume of concentrated bio-culture to inject.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_feeding_operations
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the automated feeding systems. Reducing feed is critical to stop the introduction of new nitrogen during a mortality event.

feed_rate_percentage.description: Percentage of standard feeding rate (0 to 100). Set to 0 to stop ammonia input.

state_description.water_temperature_c: Current temperature of the water in Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mg_l: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in the water (mg/L).
state_description.ph_level: The acidity or alkalinity of the water (0-14 scale).
state_description.ammonia_nitrogen_ppm: Concentration of toxic ammonia (parts per million).
state_description.water_level_meters: Current height of the water in the tank/pond.
state_description.biomass_stress_index: A calculated index (0.0 to 1.0) representing the health and stress levels of the fish based on environment conditions.
state_description.salinity_ppt: Salinity of the water in parts per thousand.
